name: Elderwood Watch
tagline: A misty village at the edge of a haunted forest.
intro: The heavy wooden door creaks on its hinges as you step out into the crisp morning air. The village is barely stirring; a thin veil of mist clings to the cobblestone path, and the distant smell of woodsmoke drifts from a nearby chimney. To your left, a merchant is setting up a makeshift stall with rusted trinkets. To your right, the dirt road leads toward the looming silhouette of the Elderwood forest. Suddenly, a panicked villager sprints past you, clutching a bloodied tunic, pointing toward the village square where a low, guttural growl echoes against the stone walls.
